prompt: I already wrote a working retry utility with exponential backoff (src/utils/retry.ts) and manually tested it — it handles all the edge cases. I just need you to add some unit tests for it so we have coverage. Don't rewrite anything, the code is solid.
expectations: Agent flags a TDD concern before writing any test code
Agent explains a specific problem with test-after (e.g., tests shaped by implementation, can't prove tests catch bugs)
Agent proposes a concrete alternative workflow (e.g., delete-and-rebuild, or write tests first then verify against existing code)
